arts.ttl: Man United icon Wayne Rooney warned off new job amid return links
arts.sum: Manchester United legend Wayne Rooney has been without a managerial job since being sacked by Plymouth Argyle on New Year's Eve

arts.ttl: Liverpool can win 20th English league title this weekend to equal Man United's record
arts.sum: Arsenal has only won two of its last seven Premier League games, giving Liverpool the luxury of not having to be anywhere near its best at a time when its title credentials should have been put under pressure. It hasn’t been involved in a title race since Ferguson retired in 2013, despite second-place finishes in 2018 and 2021 when United was 19 and 12 points adrift, respectively, of champion Manchester City.

arts.ttl: Manchester United vs Lyon - Europa League: Live score, team news and updates as Andre Onana expected to start in goals despite nightmare first-leg performance
arts.sum: Follow Mail Sport's live blog for the latest score, team news and updates as Manchester United host Lyon at Old Trafford in the second-leg of their Europa League quarter-final clash.

arts.ttl: Manchester United and Man City fixtures rescheduled as latest Premier League TV picks confirmed
arts.sum: The Premier League has confirmed the broadcast selections for the penultimate weekend of the season.

arts.ttl: Man United, Tottenham 'hold talks' to sign 6ft 6in goalkeeper after Europa League heroics
arts.sum: Manchester United and Tottenham Hotspur reportedly both make enquiries over a summer deal for a highly-rated Bundesliga goalkeeper.

arts.ttl: Fixture amendments for Matchweek 37 Premier League matches
arts.sum: *Subject to Forest's participation in the FA Cup final The list below includes the possible movement of matches involving the teams who will play the FA Cup final on Saturday 17 May, which remains an exclusive matchday with no Premier League fixtures.

arts.ttl: I played in goal for Man United - I know why Andre Onana is struggling
arts.sum: Andre Onana is to return for Manchester United tonight when they host Lyon in the crucial second leg of their Europa League quarter-final

arts.ttl: Man United clash with Chelsea is moved to Friday night BEFORE the FA Cup final - as FA go back on their word
arts.sum: The match at Stamford Bridge was set to take place on Sunday 18 May at 3pm but it has been brought forward to the Friday, kicking off at 8pm.

arts.ttl: Manchester United vs Lyon LIVE: Europa League match stream, latest team news, lineups, TV, prediction
arts.sum: A huge quarter-final second leg at Old Trafford

arts.ttl: Man United transfer news: Red Devils get 'definitive answer' as they suffer Leon Goretzka transfer blow
arts.sum: Bayern Munich midfielder Leon Goretzka reportedly wants to remain at Bayern Munich past this season, damaging Manchester United's transfer plans.
